  1. Description

Annotation Interface NotRecord

@ClassVersion(sourceVersion="$Id: NotRecord.java 1151 2025-10-01 21:32:15Z tquadrat $") @API(status=STABLE, since="0.25.0") public @interface NotRecord
Marks a class as a 'standard' class that IntelliJ suggests to be a record class.

Thomas Thrien (thomas.thrien@tquadrat.org)
